languages.text: "Прекратите это безумие!" {n}Ювенна вскидывается в праведной ярости. Ее голос становится полнозвучным и властным.{/n} "Я, Ювенна фон Валанциус, единственная наследница Вольного Торговца Себериана фон Валанциуса, обвиняю своего отца в ереси. Этим преступлением он лишает себя звания Помазанника Бога-Императора! Священный Патент не может пребывать в столь нечестивых руках! С этого момента я возлагаю на себя священное и тяжкое бремя главы дома фон Валанциус! Даю вам слово, что все, кто последует за мной, не будут обвинены в потворствовании ереси". {n}Наследница переводит дух, чтобы вновь обратиться к отцу.{/n} "Ворота не защитят тебя, отец. {name} помог{mf||ла} мне впустить в них истину".

traits.locale_text: "Прекратите это безумие!" {n}Ювенна вскидывается в праведной ярости. Ее голос становится полнозвучным и властным.{/n} "Я, Ювенна фон Валанциус, единственная наследница Вольного Торговца Себериана фон Валанциуса, обвиняю своего отца в ереси. Этим преступлением он лишает себя звания Помазанника Бога-Императора! Священный Патент не может пребывать в столь нечестивых руках! С этого момента я возлагаю на себя священное и тяжкое бремя главы дома фон Валанциус! Даю вам слово, что все, кто последует за мной, не будут обвинены в потворствовании ереси". {n}Наследница переводит дух, чтобы вновь обратиться к отцу.{/n} "Ворота не защитят тебя, отец. {name} помог{mf||ла} мне впустить в них истину".
traits.speaker: JuvennaVonValancius

languages.text: "Stop this madness!" {n}Juvenna leaps up in righteous fury, her voice suddenly powerful and commanding.{/n} "I, Juvenna von Valancius, sole heir of Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius, accuse my father of heresy. Because of this crime, his title as the God-Emperor's anointed is now forfeit! The sacred Warrant cannot remain in the hands of one so impure! From this moment forth, I will assume the great and holy burden of serving as the head of House von Valancius! I give you my word that all who follow me will not be accused of condoning heresy." {n}She takes a breath to address her father again.{/n} "The gates will not protect you, Father. {name} helped me open them to the truth."
languages.original_text: "Прекратите это безумие!" {n}Ювенна вскидывается в праведной ярости. Ее голос становится полнозвучным и властным.{/n} "Я, Ювенна фон Валанциус, единственная наследница Вольного Торговца Себериана фон Валанциуса, обвиняю своего отца в ереси. Этим преступлением он лишает себя звания Помазанника Бога-Императора! Священный Патент не может пребывать в столь нечестивых руках! С этого момента я возлагаю на себя священное и тяжкое бремя главы дома фон Валанциус! Даю вам слово, что все, кто последует за мной, не будут обвинены в потворствовании ереси". {n}Наследница переводит дух, чтобы вновь обратиться к отцу.{/n} "Ворота не защитят тебя, отец. {name} помог{mf||ла} мне впустить в них истину".

traits.locale_text: "Stop this madness!" {n}Juvenna leaps up in righteous fury, her voice suddenly powerful and commanding.{/n} "I, Juvenna von Valancius, sole heir of Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius, accuse my father of heresy. Because of this crime, his title as the God-Emperor's anointed is now forfeit! The sacred Warrant cannot remain in the hands of one so impure! From this moment forth, I will assume the great and holy burden of serving as the head of House von Valancius! I give you my word that all who follow me will not be accused of condoning heresy." {n}She takes a breath to address her father again.{/n} "The gates will not protect you, Father. {name} helped me open them to the truth."

"Stop this madness!" {n}Juvenna leaps up in righteous fury, her voice suddenly powerful and commanding.{/n} "I, Juvenna von Valancius, sole heir of Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius, accuse my father of heresy. Because of this crime, his title as the God-Emperor's anointed is now forfeit! The sacred Warrant cannot remain in the hands of one so impure! I give you my word that all who follow me will not be accused of condoning heresy." {n}She takes a breath to address her father again.{/n} "The gates will not protect you, Father. {name} helped me open them to the truth."

"In the name of Inquisitor af Irramon, stop this madness!" {n}Juvenna leaps up in righteous fury, her voice suddenly powerful and commanding.{/n} "I, Juvenna von Valancius, sole heir of Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius, accuse my father of heresy. By the power bestowed upon me by the Holy Ordos, I strip him of his title as the Emperor's anointed! I give you my word that all who follow me will not be accused of condoning heresy." {n}She takes a breath to address her father again.{/n} "The gates will not protect you, Father. {name} helped me open them to the truth."

"Stop this madness!" {n}Juvenna leaps up in righteous fury, her voice suddenly powerful and commanding.{/n} "I, Juvenna von Valancius, sole heir of Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius, accuse my father of heresy. Because of this crime, his title as the God-Emperor's anointed is now forfeit! The sacred Warrant cannot remain in the hands of one so impure! I give you my word that all who follow me will not be accused of condoning heresy." {n}She takes a breath to address her father again.{/n} "The gates will not protect you, Father. {name} helped me open them to the truth."

Because of this crime, his title as the God-Emperor's anointed is now forfeit! The sacred Warrant cannot remain in the hands of one so impure! I give you my word that all who follow me will not be accused of condoning heresy." {n}She takes a breath to address her father again.{/n} "The gates will not protect you, Father. {name} helped me open them to the truth."

"Stop this madness!" {n}Juvenna leaps up in righteous fury, her voice suddenly powerful and commanding.{/n} "I, Juvenna von Valancius, sole heir of Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius, accuse my father of heresy. Because of this crime, his title as the God-Emperor's anointed is now forfeit! The sacred Warrant cannot remain in the hands of one so impure! From this moment forth, I will assume the great and holy burden of serving as the head of House von Valancius! I give you my word that all who follow me will not be accused of condoning heresy." {n}She takes a breath to address her father again.{/n} "The gates will not protect you, Father. {name} helped me open them to the truth."

languages.text: “停止这场疯狂吧！”{n}尤文娜义愤填膺地跳出来，声音骤然变得威严而有力。{/n}“我，尤文娜·冯·瓦兰修斯，行商浪人塞贝里安的唯一继承人，指控我的父亲犯有异端之罪。正因如此，他作为神皇神选者的一切头衔即刻废止！神圣的贸易授状不能掌握在如此不洁之人手中！从此刻起，我将承担起领导冯·瓦兰修斯家族这一伟大而神圣的职责！我向你们保证，凡追随我者，绝不会被视为纵容异端之人。”{n}她深吸一口气，再次对她父亲说道：{/n}“城门救不了你，父亲。{name}帮我打开了那些大门，让我们得以通往真理。”
languages.original_text: "Stop this madness!" {n}Juvenna leaps up in righteous fury, her voice suddenly powerful and commanding.{/n} "I, Juvenna von Valancius, sole heir of Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius, accuse my father of heresy. Because of this crime, his title as the God-Emperor's anointed is now forfeit! The sacred Warrant cannot remain in the hands of one so impure! From this moment forth, I will assume the great and holy burden of serving as the head of House von Valancius! I give you my word that all who follow me will not be accused of condoning heresy." {n}She takes a breath to address her father again.{/n} "The gates will not protect you, Father. {name} helped me open them to the truth."

traits.locale_text: “停止这场疯狂吧！”{n}尤文娜义愤填膺地跳出来，声音骤然变得威严而有力。{/n}“我，尤文娜·冯·瓦兰修斯，行商浪人塞贝里安的唯一继承人，指控我的父亲犯有异端之罪。正因如此，他作为神皇神选者的一切头衔即刻废止！神圣的贸易授状不能掌握在如此不洁之人手中！从此刻起，我将承担起领导冯·瓦兰修斯家族这一伟大而神圣的职责！我向你们保证，凡追随我者，绝不会被视为纵容异端之人。”{n}她深吸一口气，再次对她父亲说道：{/n}“城门救不了你，父亲。{name}帮我打开了那些大门，让我们得以通往真理。”

languages.text: « Cessez cette folie ! » {n}Dans un élan de fureur vertueuse, Juvenna bondit, la voix soudain puissante et impérieuse.{/n} « Moi, Juvenna von Valancius, unique héritière du libre-marchand Seberian von Valancius, j'accuse mon père d'hérésie. En raison de ce crime, son titre d'élu de l'Empereur-Dieu doit lui être retiré ! La lettre de marque sacrée ne peut pas rester entre les mains d'un homme aussi impur ! À compter de cet instant, je reprends la lourde charge et la responsabilité sacrée de servir à la tête de la maison von Valancius ! Si vous me suivez, je vous en donne ma parole, vous ne serez pas accusés de l'avoir encouragé dans son erreur. » {n}Elle reprend son souffle avant de s'adresser à son père.{/n} « Les portes ne vous protégeront pas, père. {name} m'a aidée à les ouvrir à la vérité. »
languages.original_text: "Stop this madness!" {n}Juvenna leaps up in righteous fury, her voice suddenly powerful and commanding.{/n} "I, Juvenna von Valancius, sole heir of Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius, accuse my father of heresy. Because of this crime, his title as the God-Emperor's anointed is now forfeit! The sacred Warrant cannot remain in the hands of one so impure! From this moment forth, I will assume the great and holy burden of serving as the head of House von Valancius! I give you my word that all who follow me will not be accused of condoning heresy." {n}She takes a breath to address her father again.{/n} "The gates will not protect you, Father. {name} helped me open them to the truth."

traits.locale_text: « Cessez cette folie ! » {n}Dans un élan de fureur vertueuse, Juvenna bondit, la voix soudain puissante et impérieuse.{/n} « Moi, Juvenna von Valancius, unique héritière du libre-marchand Seberian von Valancius, j'accuse mon père d'hérésie. En raison de ce crime, son titre d'élu de l'Empereur-Dieu doit lui être retiré ! La lettre de marque sacrée ne peut pas rester entre les mains d'un homme aussi impur ! À compter de cet instant, je reprends la lourde charge et la responsabilité sacrée de servir à la tête de la maison von Valancius ! Si vous me suivez, je vous en donne ma parole, vous ne serez pas accusés de l'avoir encouragé dans son erreur. » {n}Elle reprend son souffle avant de s'adresser à son père.{/n} « Les portes ne vous protégeront pas, père. {name} m'a aidée à les ouvrir à la vérité. »

languages.text: «¡Detengan esta locura!». {n}Juvenna salta de furia, con una voz repentinamente poderosa e imponente.{/n} «Yo, Juvenna von Valancius, única heredera del Comerciante Independiente Seberian von Valancius, acuso a mi padre de herejía. ¡Por este crimen, su título como ungido del Emperador queda anulado! ¡La sagrada Patente no puede estar en manos de alguien tan impuro! A partir de este momento, ¡yo asumiré la gran y sagrada carga de servir como líder de la casa von Valancius! Les doy a todos mi palabra de que quienes me sigan no serán acusados de complicidad con la herejía». {n}Toma aire para volver a dirigirse a su padre.{/n} «Las puertas no te protegerán, padre. {name} me ha ayudado a abrirlas a la verdad».
languages.original_text: "Stop this madness!" {n}Juvenna leaps up in righteous fury, her voice suddenly powerful and commanding.{/n} "I, Juvenna von Valancius, sole heir of Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius, accuse my father of heresy. Because of this crime, his title as the God-Emperor's anointed is now forfeit! The sacred Warrant cannot remain in the hands of one so impure! From this moment forth, I will assume the great and holy burden of serving as the head of House von Valancius! I give you my word that all who follow me will not be accused of condoning heresy." {n}She takes a breath to address her father again.{/n} "The gates will not protect you, Father. {name} helped me open them to the truth."

traits.locale_text: «¡Detengan esta locura!». {n}Juvenna salta de furia, con una voz repentinamente poderosa e imponente.{/n} «Yo, Juvenna von Valancius, única heredera del Comerciante Independiente Seberian von Valancius, acuso a mi padre de herejía. ¡Por este crimen, su título como ungido del Emperador queda anulado! ¡La sagrada Patente no puede estar en manos de alguien tan impuro! A partir de este momento, ¡yo asumiré la gran y sagrada carga de servir como líder de la casa von Valancius! Les doy a todos mi palabra de que quienes me sigan no serán acusados de complicidad con la herejía». {n}Toma aire para volver a dirigirse a su padre.{/n} «Las puertas no te protegerán, padre. {name} me ha ayudado a abrirlas a la verdad».

languages.text: "Bu deliliği durdurun!" {n}Juvenna, haklı bir öfkeyle ayağa fırlıyor. Sesi aniden güçlü ve emredici bir hâl alıyor.{/n} "Ben Juvenna von Valancius, Hür Tacir Seberian von Valancius'un tek vârisiyim. Babamı kâfirlikle suçluyorum. Bu suçtan ötürü Tanrı İmparator'un seçilmişi ünvanı düşmüştür! Kutsal Ruhsatname, böylesine saf olmayan birinin elinde kalamaz! Şu andan itibaren von Valancius Hanesi'nin başı olarak hizmet etmek gibi büyük ve kutsal bir yükü üstleneceğim! Bana katılacakların kâfirliğe göz yummakla suçlanmayacağına söz veriyorum." {n}Babasına tekrar hitap etmek için derin bir nefes alıyor.{/n} "Kapılar seni korumayacak baba. {name}, onları gerçekliğe açmama yardım etti."
languages.original_text: "Stop this madness!" {n}Juvenna leaps up in righteous fury, her voice suddenly powerful and commanding.{/n} "I, Juvenna von Valancius, sole heir of Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius, accuse my father of heresy. Because of this crime, his title as the God-Emperor's anointed is now forfeit! The sacred Warrant cannot remain in the hands of one so impure! From this moment forth, I will assume the great and holy burden of serving as the head of House von Valancius! I give you my word that all who follow me will not be accused of condoning heresy." {n}She takes a breath to address her father again.{/n} "The gates will not protect you, Father. {name} helped me open them to the truth."

traits.locale_text: "Bu deliliği durdurun!" {n}Juvenna, haklı bir öfkeyle ayağa fırlıyor. Sesi aniden güçlü ve emredici bir hâl alıyor.{/n} "Ben Juvenna von Valancius, Hür Tacir Seberian von Valancius'un tek vârisiyim. Babamı kâfirlikle suçluyorum. Bu suçtan ötürü Tanrı İmparator'un seçilmişi ünvanı düşmüştür! Kutsal Ruhsatname, böylesine saf olmayan birinin elinde kalamaz! Şu andan itibaren von Valancius Hanesi'nin başı olarak hizmet etmek gibi büyük ve kutsal bir yükü üstleneceğim! Bana katılacakların kâfirliğe göz yummakla suçlanmayacağına söz veriyorum." {n}Babasına tekrar hitap etmek için derin bir nefes alıyor.{/n} "Kapılar seni korumayacak baba. {name}, onları gerçekliğe açmama yardım etti."

languages.text: "Schluss mit diesem Wahnsinn!" {n}Juvenna springt mit rechtschaffenem Zorn auf. Ihre Stimme ist plötzlich kräftig und gebieterisch.{/n} "Ich, Juvenna von Valancius, alleinige Erbin des Freihändlers Seberian von Valancius, bezichtige meinen Vater der Ketzerei. Aufgrund dieses Verbrechens ist sein Titel als Gesalbter des Gottimperators hiermit verwirkt. Der heilige Handelsbrief darf nicht in den Händen eines Unreinen bleiben! Von diesem Moment an nehme ich die große und heilige Bürde auf mich, als Oberhaupt von Haus von Valancius zu dienen! Ich gebe Euch mein Wort, dass niemand, der mir folgt, der Ketzerei bezichtigt wird." {n}Sie holt Luft, um sich erneut an ihren Vater zu wenden.{/n} "Die Tore werden Euch nicht schützen, Vater. {name} hat mir geholfen, sie der Wahrheit zu öffnen."
languages.original_text: "Stop this madness!" {n}Juvenna leaps up in righteous fury, her voice suddenly powerful and commanding.{/n} "I, Juvenna von Valancius, sole heir of Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius, accuse my father of heresy. Because of this crime, his title as the God-Emperor's anointed is now forfeit! The sacred Warrant cannot remain in the hands of one so impure! From this moment forth, I will assume the great and holy burden of serving as the head of House von Valancius! I give you my word that all who follow me will not be accused of condoning heresy." {n}She takes a breath to address her father again.{/n} "The gates will not protect you, Father. {name} helped me open them to the truth."

traits.locale_text: "Schluss mit diesem Wahnsinn!" {n}Juvenna springt mit rechtschaffenem Zorn auf. Ihre Stimme ist plötzlich kräftig und gebieterisch.{/n} "Ich, Juvenna von Valancius, alleinige Erbin des Freihändlers Seberian von Valancius, bezichtige meinen Vater der Ketzerei. Aufgrund dieses Verbrechens ist sein Titel als Gesalbter des Gottimperators hiermit verwirkt. Der heilige Handelsbrief darf nicht in den Händen eines Unreinen bleiben! Von diesem Moment an nehme ich die große und heilige Bürde auf mich, als Oberhaupt von Haus von Valancius zu dienen! Ich gebe Euch mein Wort, dass niemand, der mir folgt, der Ketzerei bezichtigt wird." {n}Sie holt Luft, um sich erneut an ihren Vater zu wenden.{/n} "Die Tore werden Euch nicht schützen, Vater. {name} hat mir geholfen, sie der Wahrheit zu öffnen."

languages.text: 「この狂気を止めて！」{n}ユベナは正義の怒りで立ち上がり、声は突然力強く、命令口調になった。{/n}「私は、ローグトレーダーであるセベリアン・フォン・ヴァランシウスの唯一の相続人、ユベナ・フォン・ヴァランシウス。父を異端の罪で告発する。この罪によって、神皇帝の選定を受けた称号は失われた！聖なる委任状は、汚れた者には残せない！今、私はヴァランシウス家の長として、神聖な重荷を担う！私に従う者は、異端を容認した罪で告発されることはないことを誓う！」{n}彼女は息を吸って父に語りかける。{/n}「父、門はあなたを守れない。{name}が真実を開く手助けをしてくれた。」
languages.original_text: "Stop this madness!" {n}Juvenna leaps up in righteous fury, her voice suddenly powerful and commanding.{/n} "I, Juvenna von Valancius, sole heir of Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius, accuse my father of heresy. Because of this crime, his title as the God-Emperor's anointed is now forfeit! The sacred Warrant cannot remain in the hands of one so impure! From this moment forth, I will assume the great and holy burden of serving as the head of House von Valancius! I give you my word that all who follow me will not be accused of condoning heresy." {n}She takes a breath to address her father again.{/n} "The gates will not protect you, Father. {name} helped me open them to the truth."

traits.locale_text: 「この狂気を止めて！」{n}ユベナは正義の怒りで立ち上がり、声は突然力強く、命令口調になった。{/n}「私は、ローグトレーダーであるセベリアン・フォン・ヴァランシウスの唯一の相続人、ユベナ・フォン・ヴァランシウス。父を異端の罪で告発する。この罪によって、神皇帝の選定を受けた称号は失われた！聖なる委任状は、汚れた者には残せない！今、私はヴァランシウス家の長として、神聖な重荷を担う！私に従う者は、異端を容認した罪で告発されることはないことを誓う！」{n}彼女は息を吸って父に語りかける。{/n}「父、門はあなたを守れない。{name}が真実を開く手助けをしてくれた。」
